author: coordinator-1
rationale: Post-adjudication corpus pin (P2 correction seq 2, post_run_order_of_operations step 3): replaces the corpus_hashes.d-ts-labels PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder with the kot-corpus-hash/1 digest of data/d-ts-labels/ (the blind-judge label corpus), per the frozen record's own clause pinning it AFTER adjudication completes and BEFORE the final-phase record. All three judge passes are complete (p1 GPT-5.6-Sol 808/808, p2 GPT-5.5 808/808, p3 Haiku-4.5 808/808 re-run under blinding Amendment A1) and blinding-sweep.py is GREEN over both run dirs (0 hits; the tolerated exclusions are only the A1-sanctioned f2b hex-run and nsm vendor-id-tail kinds). The digest is the reference kot-corpus-hash/1 output of tools/registry/corpus-pin.py over data/d-ts-labels/ (labels.jsonl + summary.json + the three per-judge responses files). Input pin only; no design or freeze bookkeeping field is touched; the frozen record bytes are unchanged (pure overlay). One-shot pin discipline: any change to the label corpus before the final-phase run record invalidates this value.
